upper_intermediate.title: The Passive Voice: All Tenses
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Câu bị động là gì? Khi nào dùng?
Trong câu chủ động, chủ ngữ thực hiện hành động. Trong câu bị động, chủ ngữ là người/vật nhận hành động.

Active: They take the photos in Africa.
Passive: The photos are taken in Africa.

Dùng câu bị động khi:
✦ Không biết ai thực hiện hành động: A bank was robbed yesterday.
✦ Người thực hiện rõ ràng, không cần nhắc: He was arrested last night. (= by the police)
✦ Muốn nhấn mạnh vào kết quả/đối tượng: I have been told that you insulted my brother.
✦ Văn phong trang trọng, báo chí, học thuật

Cấu trúc chung: be (chia theo thì) + past participle (V3)
📌 Bảng thì bị động – All Tenses
ThìCấu trúc bị độngVí dụ
Present Simpleam/is/are + V3Emails are sent every morning.
Present Continuousam/is/are being + V3The report is being prepared right now.
Past Simplewas/were + V3The bridge was built in 1995.
Past Continuouswas/were being + V3The room was being cleaned when we arrived.
Present Perfecthave/has been + V3The tickets have been sold already.
Past Perfecthad been + V3The letter had been sent before she arrived.
Future Simplewill be + V3The results will be announced tomorrow.
Future with going toam/is/are going to be + V3The road is going to be repaired next week.
Modalsmodal + be + V3This form must be completed in full.
⚠️ Lưu ý quan trọng
✦ Tác nhân (người thực hiện) có thể thêm bằng by: The cake was made by my mum.
✦ Không phải động từ nào cũng có bị động – động từ nội động từ (intransitive) không có tân ngữ nên không chuyển được: arrive, die, happen, exist...
✦ Câu bị động với 2 tân ngữ: She was given a prize. / A prize was given to her.
The new hospital is being built on the outskirts of town.Present Continuous Passive – đang xây dựng ngay lúc này
All the evidence had been destroyed before the police arrived.Past Perfect Passive – xảy ra trước một sự kiện trong quá khứ
The announcement will be made at tomorrow's press conference.Future Simple Passive – thông báo sẽ được đưa ra

exercises.q: The new shopping centre ___ next year.
exercises.opts: will be opened,is opened,was opened,is being opened
exercises.exp: Hành động trong tương lai → Future Passive: will be + V3

exercises.q: Look! The street ___ right now. We'll have to take a different route.
exercises.opts: is being repaired,is repaired,was being repaired,has been repaired
exercises.exp: Đang xảy ra lúc nói → Present Continuous Passive: is being + V3

exercises.q: The ancient temple ___ by an earthquake centuries ago.
exercises.opts: was destroyed,is destroyed,has been destroyed,was being destroyed
exercises.exp: Thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ → Past Simple Passive: was + V3

exercises.q: By the time the guests arrived, all the food ___.
exercises.opts: had been eaten,was eaten,has been eaten,is eaten
exercises.exp: Trước một sự kiện trong quá khứ → Past Perfect Passive: had been + V3

exercises.q: This form ___ in black ink only.
exercises.opts: must be completed,must be completing,must have completed,must complete
exercises.exp: Quy định/yêu cầu → Modal Passive: must be + V3

exercises.q: Three suspects ___ for questioning when I last heard.
exercises.opts: were being held,were held,have been held,are being held
exercises.exp: Hành động đang tiến hành tại một thời điểm trong quá khứ → Past Continuous Passive

exercises.q: The report ___ already. You can read it on the website.
exercises.opts: has been published,was published,is published,had been published
exercises.exp: Kết quả hiện tại, already → Present Perfect Passive: has been + V3

exercises.q: The documents ___ to all members before the end of the week.
exercises.opts: are going to be sent,are sent,will send,are being sent
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch tương lai → going to Passive: are going to be + V3

exercises.q: English ___ as a second language in many countries around the world.
exercises.opts: is spoken,is being spoken,was spoken,has been spoken
exercises.exp: Sự thật chung → Present Simple Passive: is + V3

exercises.q: The suspect ___ at the airport just as he was about to board the plane.
exercises.opts: was arrested,is arrested,has been arrested,was being arrested
exercises.exp: Hành động hoàn thành tại thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ → Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: This medicine ___ with water. Never take it on an empty stomach.
exercises.opts: should be taken,should be taking,should take,should have taken
exercises.exp: Lời khuyên/hướng dẫn → Modal Passive: should be + V3

exercises.q: The patient ___ when the fire alarm went off.
exercises.opts: was being examined,was examined,has been examined,is examined
exercises.exp: Đang tiến hành tại thời điểm trong quá khứ → Past Continuous Passive

exercises.q: These cars ___ in Germany and exported to over fifty countries.
exercises.opts: are manufactured,are being manufactured,were manufactured,have been manufactured
exercises.exp: Sự thật thường xuyên → Present Simple Passive

exercises.q: All the invitations ___ before we realised the date was wrong.
exercises.opts: had been sent,were sent,have been sent,were being sent
exercises.exp: Trước sự kiện trong quá khứ (before) → Past Perfect Passive

exercises.q: The stolen paintings ___ yet. The police are still searching.
exercises.opts: haven't been found,weren't found,aren't found,hadn't been found
exercises.exp: Chưa hoàn thành đến hiện tại → Present Perfect Passive (phủ định)

exercises.q: A new law ___ to reduce plastic waste next month.
exercises.opts: will be introduced,is introduced,was introduced,is being introduced
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch/quyết định trong tương lai → will be + V3

exercises.q: The roads ___ when we drove through the town last summer.
exercises.opts: were being repaired,were repaired,have been repaired,are being repaired
exercises.exp: Đang xảy ra trong quá khứ (when + past simple) → Past Continuous Passive

exercises.q: All children in the country ___ free vaccinations by the end of the programme.
exercises.opts: will have been given,will be given,are going to be given,have been given
exercises.exp: Hoàn thành trước thời điểm tương lai → Future Perfect Passive

exercises.q: This bridge ___ every ten years to ensure it remains safe.
exercises.opts: is inspected,is being inspected,was inspected,has been inspected
exercises.exp: Hành động định kỳ → Present Simple Passive

exercises.q: She ___ the Employee of the Year Award at last night's ceremony.
exercises.opts: was given,has been given,is given,had been given
exercises.exp: Thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ (last night) → Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: The new policy ___ (introduce) at tomorrow's board meeting.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch tương lai → will be + V3

exercises.q: Over two hundred applications ___ (receive) since the job was advertised last week.
exercises.exp: Kết quả tích lũy đến hiện tại → Present Perfect Passive

exercises.q: The letter ___ (type) when the computer suddenly crashed.
exercises.exp: Hành động đang diễn ra khi có sự kiện khác → Past Continuous Passive

exercises.q: All personal data ___ (protect) under the new privacy regulations.
exercises.exp: Nghĩa vụ pháp lý → Modal Passive: must be + V3

exercises.q: The championship ___ (hold) in Paris every four years.
exercises.exp: Sự kiện định kỳ → Present Simple Passive

exercises.q: The entire village ___ (evacuate) before the floodwaters rose.
exercises.exp: Xảy ra trước một sự kiện trong quá khứ → Past Perfect Passive

exercises.q: The new school ___ (build) near the park at the moment.
exercises.exp: Đang diễn ra ngay lúc nói → Present Continuous Passive

exercises.q: Thousands of trees ___ (plant) by the environmental charity last spring.
exercises.exp: Thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ (last spring) → Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: The machine ___ (fix) by the time the factory reopens on Monday.
exercises.exp: Hoàn thành trước một thời điểm trong tương lai → Future Perfect Passive

exercises.q: The exam results ___ (not/announce) yet. We're still waiting.
exercises.ans: have not been announced / haven't been announced
exercises.exp: Chưa xảy ra đến hiện tại, yet → Present Perfect Passive (phủ định)

exercises.q: Food ___ (not/allow) inside the library at any time.
exercises.exp: Quy định chung → Present Simple Passive (phủ định)

exercises.q: A new suspect ___ (question) by detectives right now.
exercises.exp: Đang xảy ra → Present Continuous Passive

exercises.q: The injured footballer ___ (take) to hospital when we heard the news.
exercises.exp: Đang diễn ra khi nghe tin → Past Continuous Passive

exercises.q: This type of cheese ___ (make) only in one region of France.
exercises.exp: Sự thật chung → Present Simple Passive

exercises.q: The architect's proposal ___ (consider) by the planning committee at the moment.
exercises.exp: Đang diễn ra → Present Continuous Passive

exercises.q: The new traffic laws ___ (enforce) more strictly since the beginning of this year.
exercises.exp: Kết quả tích lũy từ đầu năm → Present Perfect Passive

exercises.q: All passengers ___ (inform) about the delay before the plane even took off.
exercises.exp: Xảy ra trước một sự kiện quá khứ → Past Perfect Passive

exercises.q: Hundreds of job applications ___ (submit) online by the end of next Friday.
exercises.exp: Hoàn thành trước thời điểm tương lai → Future Perfect Passive

exercises.q: The famous painting ___ (restore) by experts over the past six months.
exercises.exp: Kết quả đến hiện tại → Present Perfect Passive

exercises.q: Every product ___ (quality-check) before it leaves the factory.
exercises.exp: Quy trình định kỳ → Present Simple Passive

reorder.words: the new bridge will be opened next year by the mayor
the documents had been shredded before the audit began
english is spoken as an official language in over fifty countries
the suspect was being questioned when his lawyer arrived
all the tickets have already been sold for the concert
a new hospital is going to be built near the city centre
the meal was being prepared when the guests arrived early
this bridge must be inspected by engineers every five years
the stolen jewellery was found hidden under the floorboards
the injured passengers were taken to the nearest hospital immediately
the report has been sent to all members of the committee
these cars are manufactured in germany and sold worldwide
the package will have been delivered by the time you get home
the road is being repaired so we need to use a different route
hundreds of emails are sent by the marketing team every day
the castle was built in the fourteenth century by a local nobleman
this medicine should be taken twice a day with food
the missing child was found safe and well by rescue workers
all applications must be submitted before the deadline on friday
the old theatre has been converted into a luxury hotel

passage.text: The Grand Plaza Hotel {{1}} in 1897 and {{2}} a national heritage site since 1990. For the past two years, it {{3}} extensively. The original staircase {{4}} and all the windows {{5}} with period glass imported from France. Currently, the grand ballroom {{6}} and {{7}} with hundreds of original chandeliers. It {{8}} that the renovation {{9}} next spring, and a grand reopening ceremony {{10}} by the city mayor. Rooms {{11}} soon on the hotel's website. Guests who book early {{12}} a complimentary champagne breakfast.

Wildlife trafficking is a serious global problem. Every year, thousands of animals {{1}} from their natural habitats and {{2}} to buyers across the world. Last year alone, over five hundred endangered species {{3}} by customs officials at international borders. Currently, a new international treaty {{4}} that would impose much harsher penalties. It {{5}} by many experts that tougher enforcement is the only solution. In some countries, traffickers {{6}} with prison sentences of up to twenty years. In others, the laws {{7}} properly, and criminals {{8}} with small fines. A major awareness campaign {{9}} globally at the moment, and it is hoped that more governments {{10}} to sign the treaty by the end of the year.

Last month, a groundbreaking medical discovery {{1}} by researchers at the National Institute of Health. A previously unknown compound {{2}} inside a rare plant that {{3}} only in the Amazon rainforest. Trials {{4}} immediately, and the results have been extraordinary. The drug {{5}} to treat a form of cancer that {{6}} successfully before. Since the announcement, the research {{7}} by scientists from over thirty countries. More clinical trials {{8}} right now, and the first treatment {{9}} to patients within three years. It is hoped that the drug {{10}} commercially before the end of the decade.

blanks.9: is expected to be made available

passage.text: The annual city marathon {{1}} every October for the past thirty years. This year, a new route {{2}} along the riverside, which {{3}} recently. Extra barriers {{4}} along the route at the moment, and the finishing line {{5}} in the main square. All runners {{6}} to register online, and confirmation emails {{7}} within 48 hours. Medals {{8}} by a former Olympic champion at the finish line. The event {{9}} live on national television, and highlights {{10}} on social media throughout the day.

The old factory on Millbrook Road {{1}} to a creative arts centre. Last year, planning permission {{2}} after a long campaign by local residents. The building {{3}} already, and several artists {{4}} studio spaces. The main hall {{5}} for exhibitions and performances. At the moment, the roof {{6}} and new plumbing {{7}}. It {{8}} that the centre will open to the public in June. Events {{9}} in advance on the centre's website, and a mailing list {{10}} for those who want regular updates. Over five hundred people {{11}} already.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một tòa nhà, di tích hoặc công trình lịch sử nổi tiếng ở Việt Nam hoặc thế giới – nó được xây dựng khi nào, bởi ai, đã trải qua những gì và hiện tại nó đang được sử dụng như thế nào (dùng nhiều thì bị động khác nhau)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice: Past Simple, Present Perfect, Present Simple, Present Continuous Passive
writing_prompts.example: Hội An Ancient Town, located in central Vietnam, was established as a major trading port in the 15th century. It was used by merchants from China, Japan, and Europe for hundreds of years. Much of the original architecture has been preserved remarkably well, and the town was declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1999. Over the centuries, many of the buildings were damaged by floods and wars, but they have since been carefully restored using traditional materials and methods. Today, the ancient town is visited by millions of tourists every year. New developments are not permitted within the heritage zone, and strict regulations have been introduced to protect the historic character of the streets. Several of the old merchant houses have been converted into museums where visitors can learn about the town's remarkable trading history.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một vụ tội phạm hoặc sự kiện pháp lý nổi tiếng – những gì đã xảy ra, ai bị bắt, các bằng chứng được thu thập như thế nào và vụ án đã được giải quyết ra sao (dùng thể bị động)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice: Past Simple, Past Continuous, Past Perfect, Present Perfect Passive
writing_prompts.example: In one of the most audacious art thefts of the twentieth century, thirteen priceless works were stolen from a Boston museum in 1990. The thieves, who were disguised as police officers, were allowed into the building by security guards who were then handcuffed and locked in a storage room. Over five hundred million dollars' worth of art was removed in just eighty-one minutes. Hundreds of suspects were interviewed in the months that followed, and several leads were pursued across three continents. However, no one has ever been charged in connection with the theft. The paintings have never been recovered, and the case has still not been solved. A reward of ten million dollars has been offered by the museum to anyone who provides information that leads to the return of the artworks.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về quy trình sản xuất một sản phẩm quen thuộc (cà phê, chocolate, giày dép...) từ nguyên liệu thô đến thành phẩm – dùng câu bị động để mô tả các bước
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice: Present Simple (processes and procedures)
writing_prompts.example: Coffee is one of the most consumed beverages in the world, and its journey from plant to cup is a long and complex one. The coffee plant is grown in tropical regions around the world, primarily in countries such as Brazil, Ethiopia, and Vietnam. Once the cherries are ripe, they are harvested by hand or by machine, depending on the terrain and the scale of the plantation. After harvesting, the outer layers are removed and the beans are dried in the sun for several weeks. They are then sorted by size and quality, and any defective beans are discarded. Next, the beans are shipped to processing facilities around the world, where they are roasted at high temperatures to develop their distinctive flavour. Once roasted, they are ground and packaged. The finished product is then distributed to supermarkets, cafés, and restaurants, where it is finally enjoyed by millions of people every single day.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về những thay đổi lớn đã xảy ra ở thành phố hoặc khu vực bạn sống trong 10 năm qua – những gì đã được xây dựng, phá bỏ, cải tạo hoặc bảo tồn (dùng thể bị động)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice: Present Perfect, Past Simple, Present Continuous Passive, Future Passive
writing_prompts.example: Over the past decade, my city has been transformed almost beyond recognition. Dozens of new apartment blocks have been constructed along the riverfront, and several old factories have been demolished to make way for parks and public spaces. The city's main market, which had been allowed to fall into disrepair for years, was finally renovated in 2019, and it has since been reopened to the public. A new metro system has been introduced, and two additional lines are currently being built to connect the outer districts to the city centre. Many of the narrow old streets have been widened, though some residents feel that too much of the original character of the city has been lost in the process. Plans for a new cultural centre have been approved, and it is expected to be completed within the next three years.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một thảm họa tự nhiên hoặc sự cố môi trường – nguyên nhân, hậu quả, những gì đã được làm để ứng phó và những bài học đã được rút ra (dùng thể bị động)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice: Past Simple, Present Perfect, Modal Passive, Future Passive
writing_prompts.example: In 2011, a devastating earthquake and tsunami struck the northeast coast of Japan, causing destruction on a scale that had rarely been seen before. Entire coastal towns were swept away within minutes, and over fifteen thousand people were killed. Hundreds of thousands of residents were forced to evacuate their homes, and many were not permitted to return for years. Emergency shelters were set up across the region, and food and medical supplies were distributed by rescue teams from dozens of countries. The damaged nuclear plant at Fukushima was eventually brought under control, though contaminated water continued to be released into the sea for years afterward. Since the disaster, enormous resources have been invested in rebuilding the affected communities. New sea walls have been constructed along large sections of the coastline, and emergency response systems have been significantly improved. It has been recognised that lessons must be learned and applied to disaster preparedness around the world.

upper_intermediate.title: The Passive with Reporting Verbs: It is said that…
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Reporting Verbs trong câu bị động – Dùng khi nào?
Trong văn báo chí và văn phong trang trọng, chúng ta thường dùng dạng bị động của động từ tường thuật để đưa thông tin mà chúng ta không chắc chắn hoặc muốn giữ khoảng cách với nguồn tin.

Các reporting verbs thông dụng: say, believe, think, report, consider, expect, know, claim, understand, allege, estimate, suggest, suppose

Hai cấu trúc chính:

✦ Cấu trúc 1: It + passive reporting verb + that + mệnh đề
It is said that they are in Las Vegas.
It is believed that the murderer is no longer in the country.
It was reported that over a hundred people were injured.

✦ Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive reporting verb + infinitive
They are said to be in Las Vegas.
The murderer is believed to be no longer in the country.
📌 Dạng động từ nguyên mẫu sau Cấu trúc 2
Khi nàoDạng infinitiveVí dụ
Hành động đồng thời (cùng lúc)to + V (bare infinitive)He is said to have the biggest art collection.
Hành động đang diễn ra đồng thờito be + V-ingThey are thought to be living abroad.
Hành động trong tương laito + V (bare infinitive)She is expected to become a superstar.
Hành động đã xảy ra trướcto have + V3He is said to have escaped through the window.
⚠️ Lưu ý: Chuyển đổi giữa hai cấu trúc
It is said that he escaped through the window.
→ He is said to have escaped through the window. (hành động trong quá khứ → to have + V3)

It is believed that they are hiding in the mountains.
→ They are believed to be hiding in the mountains. (đang diễn ra → to be + V-ing)
It is believed that the missing hiker is still alive.Cấu trúc 1: It + passive verb + that-clause
The company is reported to have lost millions in the scandal.Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive verb + to have + V3 (quá khứ)
She is expected to win the championship next week.Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive verb + to + V (tương lai)

exercises.q: ___ that the new vaccine is highly effective against the virus.
exercises.opts: It is believed,It believes,They believe,It is believing
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It + passive reporting verb + that

exercises.q: The prime minister ___ to resign before the end of the year.
exercises.opts: is expected,expects,is expecting,was expected to have
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive reporting verb + to + infinitive (tương lai)

exercises.q: The suspect ___ to have fled the country the night of the crime.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive reporting verb + to have + V3 (quá khứ)

exercises.q: ___ that the volcano could erupt at any moment.
exercises.opts: It is feared,It fears,They are fearing,It was feared to
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It + passive reporting verb + that-clause

exercises.q: The couple ___ to be living in a remote village in Switzerland.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive verb + to be + V-ing (đang diễn ra)

exercises.q: It ___ that the government will announce new measures next week.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It + passive reporting verb + that

exercises.q: The ancient tomb ___ to contain priceless artefacts.
exercises.opts: is said,says,is saying,was said to have
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + is said + to + infinitive (đồng thời)

exercises.q: It was reported ___ more than fifty people had been hospitalised after the accident.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It was reported that + mệnh đề

exercises.q: The missing children ___ to have been found safe and well.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + passive verb + to have + V3 (hành động đã hoàn thành)

exercises.q: The actress ___ to earn over twenty million dollars per film.
exercises.opts: is said,says,is telling,was said to have
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + is said + to + V (thực tế hiện tại)

exercises.q: It is ___ that the new drug can cure the disease in most patients.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is + past participle + that-clause

exercises.q: The CEO ___ to be considering stepping down from the company.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + continuous infinitive: Subject + passive verb + to be + V-ing

exercises.q: It was alleged ___ the official had accepted bribes from the contractor.
exercises.exp: It was alleged that + mệnh đề = điều bị cáo buộc

exercises.q: Over three thousand artefacts ___ to have been looted from the museum.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + are estimated + to have + V3

exercises.q: The two countries ___ to be close to signing a peace agreement.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + continuous infinitive: to be + V-ing → to be close to

exercises.q: ___ that the defendant had been at the scene of the crime.
exercises.opts: It was alleged,It alleged,They alleged,It was alleging
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1 ở quá khứ: It was + passive verb + that

exercises.q: The hacker ___ to have stolen data from over a million accounts.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + is thought + to have + V3

exercises.q: It is widely ___ that climate change is the biggest threat of our time.
exercises.exp: It is widely considered that + mệnh đề

exercises.q: The property ___ to be worth over five million pounds.
exercises.opts: is believed,believes,is believing,was believed to have
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + is believed + to + V (hiện tại)

exercises.q: It is ___ that the species may be extinct within thirty years.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is + past participle + that

exercises.q: ___ (report) that over a million people have been displaced by the conflict.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is reported that + mệnh đề

exercises.q: The footballer ___ (say / earn) around two hundred thousand pounds a week.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + is said + to + V (thực tế hiện tại)

exercises.q: ___ (believe) that the painting was stolen to order for a private collector.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is believed that

exercises.q: The two leaders ___ (understand / hold) secret talks in the Swiss capital.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + continuous: Subject + are understood + to be + V-ing

exercises.q: The politician ___ (allege / accept) money from foreign donors.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + perfect infinitive: Subject + is alleged + to have + V3

exercises.q: ___ (know) that excessive sugar consumption can lead to serious health problems.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is known that

exercises.q: The fugitive ___ (believe / hide) in a remote cabin in the mountains.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + continuous: to be + V-ing

exercises.q: The new stadium ___ (expect / complete) before the start of the season.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: Subject + is expected + to be + V3 (passive infinitive)

exercises.q: ___ (estimate) that the earthquake caused over three billion dollars in damage.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is estimated that

exercises.q: The scientist ___ (claim / discover) a cure for the most common form of the disease.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + perfect infinitive: to have + V3 (quá khứ)

exercises.q: The CEO ___ (think / plan) to announce a major restructuring next quarter.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + continuous infinitive: is thought + to be + V-ing

exercises.q: ___ (suggest) that the new policy may lead to significant job losses.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is suggested that

exercises.q: The ancient ruins ___ (believe / date back) to the second century BC.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2: are believed + to + V (hiện tại)

exercises.q: ___ (announce) that the festival has been postponed until further notice.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It has been announced that

exercises.q: The witness ___ (say / see) the suspect leaving the building at midnight.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + perfect infinitive: is said + to have + V3

exercises.q: ___ (consider) that the new regulation is the most significant in decades.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is considered that

exercises.q: The two companies ___ (report / negotiate) a multi-billion dollar merger.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + continuous: are reported + to be + V-ing

exercises.q: ___ (understand) that the government plans to cut funding for public services.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is understood that

exercises.q: The athlete ___ (allege / take) performance-enhancing drugs during the season.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 2 + perfect infinitive: to have + V3

exercises.q: ___ (suppose) that the explosion was caused by a gas leak in the basement.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 1: It is supposed that

reorder.words: it is believed that the suspect has already left the country
the actor is said to earn over fifteen million dollars per film
it was reported that dozens of people had been injured in the explosion
the politician is alleged to have received payments from foreign companies
it is thought that the treasure is buried somewhere beneath the old castle
the couple are believed to be hiding in a remote village abroad
it is widely considered that education is the key to development
the volcano is expected to erupt again within the next ten years
it is feared that the species will become extinct by the end of the century
the hacker is thought to have stolen data from millions of accounts
it is understood that both sides are close to reaching a final agreement
the company is estimated to have lost over one billion dollars last year
it was alleged that the official had accepted bribes for years
the missing scientist is reported to be working on a classified project
it is known that stress can have a serious impact on physical health
the new treatment is said to have cured patients in all early trials
it is claimed that the ancient tomb has never been opened before
the president is expected to make a major announcement this evening
it is supposed that the crash was caused by a technical failure
the painting is believed to have been hidden during the second world war

passage.text: A mysterious billionaire known only as 'Mr. X' {{1}} to own properties in over twenty countries. {{2}} that he made his fortune in technology before quietly disappearing from public life. He {{3}} to have sold his company for a record-breaking sum, though no official figures have been released. Currently, he {{4}} to be living somewhere in Southeast Asia, and it {{5}} that he has adopted a completely new identity. He {{6}} to be funding a secret research project on life extension. {{7}} that several world-famous scientists {{8}} to be working for him. It {{9}} that he will emerge publicly within the next five years, but nothing {{10}} confirmed by any official source.

{{1}} that a rare species of bird, previously thought to be extinct, has been spotted in the highlands of northern Vietnam. The bird {{2}} to have last been seen in the wild over sixty years ago. Local guides {{3}} to have photographed the creature near a remote lake. {{4}} that the bird's distinctive call was also recorded by a research team. Conservationists {{5}} to be travelling to the region to investigate the sighting. {{6}} that the government will designate the area a protected nature reserve. It {{7}} that hundreds of the birds may still exist in undiscovered parts of the forest. The discovery {{8}} to be one of the most significant wildlife findings of the decade. {{9}} that more expeditions {{10}} to take place over the coming months.

Reports are emerging about a major financial scandal at one of the country's leading banks. {{1}} that the chairman {{2}} to have authorised a series of illegal transactions over several years. Hundreds of millions of pounds {{3}} to have been moved to offshore accounts without shareholders' knowledge. The chairman {{4}} to be cooperating with investigators, though sources suggest he {{5}} to have known about the activities for over a decade. Several board members {{6}} to have resigned already, and more departures {{7}}. {{8}} that a full independent inquiry will be launched within days. The bank's shares {{9}} to have fallen sharply on the news, and {{10}} that regulators will impose heavy fines.

A documentary about street art has brought renewed attention to a mysterious figure known as 'Shadow'. {{1}} that Shadow has been creating huge murals in city centres around the world for over fifteen years. The artist {{2}} to operate exclusively at night, and {{3}} that no one has ever witnessed the creation of a piece. Shadow {{4}} to have spent years studying classical painting before abandoning the traditional art world. {{5}} that the artist's true identity is known to just three people. Several of Shadow's works {{6}} to have sold for millions at auction, despite the artist's stated opposition to commercialism. {{7}} that Shadow {{8}} to be working on the largest piece yet, somewhere in Asia. The art world {{9}} to be divided on whether Shadow's work deserves to be called fine art. {{10}} that a major exhibition is being planned, though nothing has been officially confirmed.

A new study on the health effects of remote working has attracted international attention. {{1}} that employees who work from home are significantly more productive than those in traditional offices. However, {{2}} that long-term remote working can also lead to serious mental health challenges. It {{3}} by the authors that companies should introduce hybrid working models as standard. Several large corporations {{4}} to already be reviewing their working policies in response to the findings. {{5}} that the study involved over fifty thousand participants across twelve countries. The lead researcher {{6}} to have spent seven years compiling the data. {{7}} that a follow-up study will be published within two years. Governments around the world {{8}} to be considering new legislation to protect remote workers' rights. {{9}} that the report will have a lasting impact on workplace policy. Critics, however, {{10}} to question some of the study's methodology.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một bài báo ngắn về một nhân vật bí ẩn hoặc nổi tiếng – dùng các cấu trúc bị động của reporting verbs để đưa ra các thông tin chưa được xác nhận (It is said that…, Subject + is believed to…)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive of reporting verbs: It is said/believed/reported/thought + that; Subject + is said/believed/reported/thought + to (have) + V
writing_prompts.example: A reclusive tech entrepreneur known in financial circles only as 'the architect' is believed to have amassed a fortune of over forty billion dollars through a series of anonymous investments. It is reported that he sold his first company at the age of nineteen, though no official records have been made public. He is said to be living somewhere in the Swiss Alps under a false identity, and it is claimed that he has not been photographed in over a decade. Several prominent politicians are alleged to have sought his financial backing for their campaigns, though this has been firmly denied. It is thought that he is currently funding a network of environmental charities across three continents. He is expected to emerge publicly at some point, but as yet, nothing has been confirmed. It is widely believed that when he does, the announcement will reshape the world of global philanthropy entirely.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết một đoạn tường thuật tin tức về một sự kiện thiên tai hoặc thảm họa – sử dụng các cấu trúc bị động với reporting verbs như trong văn phong báo chí
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: It is reported/estimated/feared/believed + that; Subject + is said/thought/reported + to (have/be) + V
writing_prompts.example: A powerful earthquake measuring 7.8 on the Richter scale struck the coastal region early this morning, and it is feared that the death toll may rise significantly as rescue operations continue. Over three thousand people are believed to have been left homeless, and dozens of villages are reported to be completely without power or water. It is estimated that the earthquake caused damage worth several billion dollars to infrastructure in the region. Several hospitals are said to be overwhelmed with casualties, and it is understood that military personnel have been deployed to assist with the relief effort. Aid organisations are thought to be mobilising supplies from neighbouring countries. It is hoped that international rescue teams will arrive within the next twenty-four hours. The prime minister is expected to visit the affected region tomorrow to oversee the emergency response.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một phát hiện khoa học hoặc bước đột phá y học mới – sử dụng reporting verbs ở thể bị động để thể hiện mức độ chắc chắn khác nhau của các thông tin
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive reporting verbs with varying degrees of certainty
writing_prompts.example: Scientists at a leading research university have announced what is thought to be one of the most significant medical breakthroughs of the century. A new compound is claimed to be capable of halting the progression of Alzheimer's disease in the early stages, and it is believed that clinical trials have produced results far beyond what was initially expected. The lead researcher is said to have been working on the compound for over fifteen years. It is reported that the drug has so far been tested on several hundred patients, and it is understood that the results have been overwhelmingly positive. However, it is known that much more research will be needed before the treatment can be approved for widespread use. It is estimated that, if approved, the drug could benefit over fifty million people worldwide. It is hoped that a full regulatory review will be completed within the next three years.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một sự kiện thể thao lớn sắp diễn ra (World Cup, Olympic, giải vô địch...) – sử dụng các cấu trúc bị động của reporting verbs để đưa tin về các dự đoán, kỳ vọng và thông tin chưa được xác nhận liên quan đến sự kiện đó
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive reporting verbs: It is expected/predicted/hoped/feared + that; Subject + is tipped/expected/believed/said + to + V
writing_prompts.example: With the World Cup just months away, speculation is mounting about which nation will claim the trophy. Brazil is widely considered to be the strongest squad in the tournament, and several key players are reported to have returned to full fitness after injury. It is expected that the opening ceremony will attract a global television audience of over two billion people. The host nation is said to be preparing an unprecedented security operation, and it is understood that over forty thousand additional police officers will be deployed across the venues. It is predicted that ticket prices on the secondary market will reach record levels, with some seats reportedly changing hands for ten times their face value. Several star players are believed to be on the verge of announcing their international retirement after the tournament, though nothing has been officially confirmed. It is hoped that the event will be remembered not only for the quality of the football, but also for its organisation and atmosphere. One thing, however, is feared by many fans: that commercial pressures are gradually undermining what was once the world's most purely competitive sporting event.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn mô tả tin đồn hoặc thông tin chưa xác nhận về một công ty lớn hoặc thương hiệu nổi tiếng – sử dụng reporting verbs ở thể bị động để thể hiện rằng thông tin chưa được kiểm chứng chính thức
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive of reporting verbs with various subjects and tenses; It is rumoured/claimed/suggested + that; Subject + is alleged/said/thought + to (have) + V
writing_prompts.example: Rumours are swirling around one of the world's most recognisable technology brands, and financial analysts are watching developments very closely. It is rumoured that the company is planning to launch an entirely new product category that would mark its boldest departure from its existing range in over a decade. The chief executive is said to be personally overseeing the project, which is thought to have been in development for at least five years. It is claimed that the company has filed patents in seventeen countries in connection with the new device, though the filings are deliberately vague. Several former employees are alleged to have leaked details to technology journalists, and it is suggested that a formal announcement could come as early as next quarter. The company's share price is reported to have risen sharply on the back of the speculation, though official statements have been non-committal. It is believed that the product, if it exists, would directly challenge two of the company's biggest rivals. It is widely understood that the stakes could not be higher, and investors are said to be watching every move with extraordinary attention.

upper_intermediate.title: Have Something Done
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Have Something Done – Nghĩa là gì?
Chúng ta dùng have + object + past participle khi muốn nói về việc nhờ người khác làm gì đó cho mình (thường là trả tiền, thuyết phục, hoặc yêu cầu họ).

So sánh:
We clean the house every Friday. (= chúng tôi tự dọn)
We have the house cleaned every Friday. (= thuê người khác dọn)

Cấu trúc: have + object + past participle (V3)

I had my hair cut yesterday. (Tôi đi cắt tóc – người thợ cắt)
She's having her house redecorated. (Cô ấy đang cho sửa lại nhà)
We had the car serviced last month. (Chúng tôi đưa xe đi bảo dưỡng)
📌 Câu phủ định và câu hỏi
⚠️ have trong cấu trúc này KHÔNG phải auxiliary verb, vì vậy phải dùng do/did cho phủ định và câu hỏi:

We don't usually have the house painted; we do it ourselves.
Did you have your house painted? It looks great!

Nếu có auxiliary verb thì dùng auxiliary verb đó:
She hasn't had her eyes tested yet.
Are you having the windows replaced?
📌 Have Something Done – Ở các thì khác nhau
ThìVí dụ
Present SimpleI have my nails done every two weeks.
Present ContinuousShe is having her kitchen renovated at the moment.
Past SimpleThey had the roof repaired last winter.
Present PerfectHe has just had his car serviced.
FutureI'm going to have my eyes tested next week.
ModalYou should have your blood pressure checked.

💡 Get something done cũng có nghĩa tương tự và phổ biến trong văn nói:
I need to get my laptop fixed.
I'm going to have my hair coloured at the salon this weekend.Future: going to + have + obj + V3
Did you have your teeth whitened? They look amazing!Câu hỏi quá khứ: did + subject + have + obj + V3
She has had her apartment completely renovated.Present Perfect: has + had + obj + V3

exercises.q: My car was making a strange noise, so I ___ it ___ at the garage.
exercises.exp: Nhờ người khác (thợ) kiểm tra → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: She ___ her portrait ___ by a famous artist last year.
exercises.exp: Nhờ họa sĩ vẽ chân dung → had + obj + V3 (Past Simple)

exercises.q: I need to ___ my eyes ___ – I can't read small print anymore.
exercises.exp: Nhờ bác sĩ kiểm tra mắt → have + obj + V3

exercises.q: ___ you ever ___ your handwriting ___ by an expert?
exercises.exp: Present Perfect của have something done: Have + had + obj + V3

exercises.q: She ___ her dress ___ especially for the awards ceremony.
exercises.exp: Thuê nhà thiết kế làm riêng → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: We are ___ a new alarm system ___ in the office this week.
exercises.exp: Present Continuous: are having + obj + V3

exercises.q: You should ___ your blood pressure ___ regularly if you're over fifty.
exercises.exp: Lời khuyên → should have + obj + V3

exercises.q: I'm going to ___ the whole house ___ before we sell it.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch tương lai → going to + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: ___ she ___ her suit ___ for the interview or is she buying a new one?
exercises.exp: Present Continuous câu hỏi: Is + having + obj + V3

exercises.q: They ___ the exterior of their house ___ last summer. It looks much better now.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: I ___ my laptop ___ yet. The screen is still cracked.
exercises.exp: Present Perfect phủ định: haven't had + obj + V3

exercises.q: He ___ a security camera ___ outside his front door after the break-in.
exercises.exp: Nhờ thợ lắp camera → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: You look different! ___ you ___ your hair ___?
exercises.exp: Present Perfect câu hỏi: Have + had + obj + V3

exercises.q: The company ___ its accounts ___ by an independent firm every year.
exercises.exp: Thói quen/quy định định kỳ → has + obj + V3 (Present Simple)

exercises.q: She'll ___ her wedding photos ___ into a beautiful album.
exercises.exp: Tương lai: will + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: I can't believe they ___ the whole building ___ in just three weeks!
exercises.exp: Thuê người phá dỡ → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: We need to ___ the pipes ___ before winter arrives.
exercises.exp: Cần nhờ người kiểm tra → need to + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: They ___ a swimming pool ___ in their back garden last year.
exercises.exp: Thuê người xây hồ bơi → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: ___ you ___ the contract ___ by your lawyer before you sign it?
exercises.exp: Câu hỏi tương lai: Will + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: I ___ my wisdom teeth ___ last month. It was quite painful.
exercises.exp: Nhờ nha sĩ nhổ răng → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: I need to ___ my suit ___ (dry-clean) before the wedding.
exercises.exp: Nhờ tiệm giặt → have + obj + V3

exercises.q: They ___ their front door ___ (replace) because it was old and draughty.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: She ___ currently ___ her kitchen ___ (redesign) by an interior decorator.
exercises.ans: is currently having her kitchen redesigned
exercises.exp: Present Continuous: is having + obj + V3

exercises.q: You should ___ your hearing ___ (test) if you're having trouble in conversations.
exercises.exp: Lời khuyên: should + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: ___ you ever ___ your fortune ___ (tell) by a professional?
exercises.ans: Have you ever had your fortune told
exercises.exp: Present Perfect câu hỏi: Have + ever + had + obj + V3

exercises.q: We ___ our boiler ___ (service) every autumn before the cold weather begins.
exercises.exp: Thói quen định kỳ → Present Simple: have + obj + V3

exercises.q: He ___ his whole apartment ___ (redecorate) after he won the lottery.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: I'm going to ___ my phone screen ___ (repair) at the shop tomorrow.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch tương lai: going to + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: She ___ not yet ___ the results ___ (confirm) by a specialist.
exercises.ans: has not yet had the results confirmed
exercises.exp: Present Perfect phủ định: has not had + obj + V3

exercises.q: They ___ a state-of-the-art security system ___ (install) throughout the building.
exercises.ans: had a state-of-the-art security system installed
exercises.exp: Quá khứ → had + obj + V3

exercises.q: She ___ her teeth ___ (whiten) before her wedding last month.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ: had + obj + V3

exercises.q: We ___ the old chimney ___ (remove) because it was unsafe.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ: had + obj + V3

exercises.q: He ___ his blood ___ (test) every six months as a precaution.
exercises.exp: Thói quen định kỳ: has + obj + V3 (Present Simple)

exercises.q: They ___ their luggage ___ (deliver) directly to the hotel.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ: had + obj + V3

exercises.q: I'd love to ___ my portrait ___ (paint) one day.
exercises.exp: Nguyện vọng: would love to + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: She ___ her flat ___ (value) by three different estate agents.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ: had + obj + V3

exercises.q: You really should ___ your roof ___ (inspect) after the storm.
exercises.exp: Lời khuyên: should + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: They ___ a new fence ___ (erect) along the boundary of the property.
exercises.exp: Quá khứ: had + obj + V3

exercises.q: I am planning to ___ my study ___ (convert) into a home office.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch: plan to + have + obj + V3

exercises.q: He ___ his bicycle ___ (repair) three times this year already.
exercises.exp: Present Perfect: has + had + obj + V3

reorder.words: i had my car serviced at the garage last weekend
she is having her kitchen completely renovated at the moment
you should have your eyes tested at least once a year
did you have the windows replaced before you moved in
we are going to have the garden landscaped next spring
he has just had his passport photo taken at the post office
i have my nails done at the salon every two weeks
they had the entire roof repaired before the rainy season began
she has never had her handwriting analysed by an expert before
will you have your hair coloured for the ceremony tomorrow
i need to have my laptop fixed before the presentation on friday
they are having a new swimming pool built in the garden
he had his wisdom teeth removed at the dental clinic last month
have you had your blood pressure checked recently by a doctor
we had our wedding photos printed into a beautiful album
she had her dress designed by a famous fashion house in paris
i should have the contract reviewed by my lawyer before signing
they are having the old factory converted into modern apartments
he is going to have his portrait painted by a local artist
i haven't had my boiler serviced yet and winter is coming

passage.text: Moving into a new home often means a long list of jobs that need to be done by professionals. When Linh and her husband bought their house last year, the first thing they did was {{1}} the entire electrical system {{2}} by a qualified engineer. The wiring was dangerously old. They then {{3}} the kitchen {{4}} completely, as it hadn't been touched in over twenty years. At the same time, they {{5}} new windows {{6}} throughout the property to improve energy efficiency. Recently, they {{7}} the garden {{8}} by a local landscaping company, and it now looks wonderful. Next month, they're planning to {{9}} a home security system {{10}} and they also want to {{11}} the loft {{12}} to create an extra bedroom. They {{13}} the exterior of the house {{14}} already, so the property is finally beginning to look like their dream home.

Celebrity lifestyle often involves having everything done by someone else. Pop star Mia {{1}} her hair {{2}} by her personal stylist every morning before any public appearance. She {{3}} her outfits {{4}} by top designers for major events, and she never wears the same dress twice. Recently, she {{5}} her penthouse apartment {{6}} by one of the world's most exclusive interior design firms. She {{7}} her groceries {{8}} weekly, and a private chef prepares all her meals. Next month, she {{9}} a portrait {{10}} by a renowned artist as a gift for her parents. She is also planning to {{11}} her vintage sports car completely {{12}}. It {{13}} recently {{14}} to her by a former partner. Despite all this, she insists she {{15}} her own make-up {{16}} herself every day – at least that is what she tells journalists.

Running a successful restaurant means {{1}} many things {{2}} by specialists. Chef Marco {{3}} his kitchen equipment {{4}} professionally twice a year to ensure everything is safe and efficient. He {{5}} fresh ingredients {{6}} from local farms every morning. Every few months, he {{7}} the restaurant's signage {{8}} to keep the branding fresh. Currently, he {{9}} the main dining room {{10}} by an interior designer, as he wants to attract a more upmarket clientele. He has also {{11}} a new sound system {{12}} throughout the space. Next month, he is planning to {{13}} the menu {{14}} by a food critic before it is officially launched. He {{15}} never {{16}} the recipes {{17}} by anyone outside his team before, so this is quite a significant step for him.

Preparing for a wedding involves {{1}} an enormous number of things {{2}} by other people. The couple {{3}} their invitations {{4}} by a calligrapher three months before the big day. They {{5}} their venue {{6}} with thousands of flowers by a local florist. The bride {{7}} her dress {{8}} especially for the occasion by a designer in Paris. She is also {{9}} her hair and make-up {{10}} by a professional on the morning of the wedding. The groom {{11}} his suit {{12}} to fit perfectly. They {{13}} a twelve-tier cake {{14}} by a specialist bakery. The ceremony will be {{15}} and the reception {{16}} by a professional videographer. By the time the wedding day arrives, the couple will {{17}} every detail {{18}} by a dedicated team of experts.

Maintaining a historic manor house requires {{1}} an enormous amount of work {{2}} by skilled professionals. The current owner, Lady Ashworth, {{3}} the roof {{4}} every five years by specialist craftsmen. She {{5}} the gardens {{6}} weekly by a team of professional gardeners. Last year, she {{7}} the entire east wing {{8}} after serious water damage was discovered. She {{9}} the original paintings {{10}} by a leading art restorer from London. Currently, she {{11}} the old ballroom floor {{12}} using traditional techniques. She is also planning to {{13}} the heating system {{14}} with a modern but discreet alternative. She {{15}} recently {{16}} a full structural survey {{17}} by a team of engineers, who confirmed that the building is fundamentally sound despite its age. By the end of the decade, she hopes to {{18}} every room in the house {{19}} to its original Victorian splendour.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về lần gần nhất bạn nhờ ai đó làm gì đó cho bạn (sửa xe, cắt tóc, thiết kế, sửa nhà...) – điều gì khiến bạn quyết định thuê người thay vì tự làm, trải nghiệm đó như thế nào và kết quả ra sao (sử dụng have/get something done)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Have something done: Past Simple, Present Perfect, and other tenses
writing_prompts.example: Last month, I finally decided to have my apartment completely repainted after living with the same dull grey walls for five years. I had originally planned to do it myself over a long weekend, but after watching a few tutorials online, I quickly realised I had neither the skill nor the patience for it. In the end, I had the whole apartment repainted professionally by a local decorating company, and I am so relieved I made that decision. I also had a new bookcase built into the living room wall by a carpenter, which has transformed the space entirely. While the decorators were working, I had the bathroom tiles replaced and got the kitchen lights rewired by an electrician, as they had been flickering dangerously for months. The whole process took ten days and cost more than I had budgeted, but the results have been extraordinary. I have already had several friends tell me it looks like a completely different flat.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về kế hoạch cải tạo, sửa chữa hoặc nâng cấp một ngôi nhà/căn phòng bạn muốn thực hiện trong tương lai – bạn sẽ nhờ ai làm gì và tại sao không tự làm (sử dụng have/get something done ở các thì tương lai)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Have something done: Future tenses (will, going to, present continuous for arrangements)
writing_prompts.example: Once I have saved enough money, I am going to have my entire kitchen redesigned by a professional interior designer. The current layout is inefficient and the cupboards are falling apart, so I will have all of them replaced with custom-built units. I am also planning to have the old gas cooker removed and a modern induction hob installed in its place. Next spring, I intend to have the garden landscaped, as it has been completely neglected for years and I simply do not have the expertise to do it myself. I will have a seating area created in one corner and have some raised flower beds built along the fence. After that, I am going to have the exterior of the house repainted, as the current colour is faded and peeling. I would also like to have solar panels fitted on the roof at some point, though that will require more planning. By the time everything is finished, I will have had almost the whole house transformed.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về sự khác biệt giữa những việc bạn tự làm và những việc bạn thường thuê người khác làm – tại sao bạn lựa chọn như vậy và kinh nghiệm của bạn với mỗi loại là gì (sử dụng have something done và so sánh với việc tự làm)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Have something done vs doing things yourself; various tenses
writing_prompts.example: I tend to be quite independent when it comes to household tasks, but there are certain things I have always preferred to have done by professionals. I do my own cooking, cleaning, and basic decorating without a second thought. However, I have always had my car serviced at a garage because I know nothing about engines and could easily cause more damage than I fix. Similarly, I have always had my tax return prepared by an accountant, as the rules change every year and I cannot afford to make mistakes. When my bathroom ceiling developed a serious leak last year, I initially tried to fix it myself, but after making the situation considerably worse, I ended up having the whole ceiling replastered by a professional. It cost twice as much as it would have done originally. These days, I also have my suits dry-cleaned rather than washing them myself, as I once ruined an expensive jacket by ignoring the label. I suppose I am gradually learning which jobs are worth attempting and which are best left to the experts.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn là người nổi tiếng hoặc người rất giàu có – hãy mô tả một ngày điển hình của bạn, tập trung vào tất cả những việc bạn nhờ người khác làm cho mình (sử dụng have/get something done ở nhiều thì khác nhau)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Have something done: Present Simple (habits/routines), Present Continuous, Perfect tenses
hint_words: get my hair and make-up done
writing_prompts.example: A typical day in my life as a celebrated film director begins long before I leave the house. I have my breakfast prepared by a private chef who arrives at six every morning, and my schedule is organised the evening before by my personal assistant. By the time I sit down to eat, I have already had the day's emails filtered and my most important calls screened. I have my car driven by a professional driver, which gives me time to read scripts on the way to the studio. Once on set, I have my every instruction relayed through a team of assistants. I get my wardrobe selected by a personal stylist for any public appearances, and I have my social media accounts managed entirely by a communications team, as I find it exhausting and distracting. In the evenings, I have my dinner delivered from one of three rotating restaurants, and once or twice a week I have a deep tissue massage done at the house. People often ask whether I find it strange having so many things done for me. Honestly, at first I did, but now I simply regard it as efficient.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một lĩnh vực trong cuộc sống (sức khỏe, vẻ ngoài, công nghệ, nhà cửa...) mà bạn nghĩ mọi người nên nhờ chuyên gia làm thay vì tự mình cố gắng – đưa ra lý do và ví dụ cụ thể (sử dụng have something done + modal verbs)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Have something done with modal verbs (should, must, ought to, need to) + various tenses
writing_prompts.example: When it comes to electrical work, I feel very strongly that people should always have it done by a qualified professional rather than attempting it themselves. Every year, thousands of house fires are caused by amateur electrical repairs that might have seemed straightforward at the time. You should have your wiring inspected by a certified electrician at least every ten years, and if you move into an older property, you ought to have the entire system checked before you even unpack. Similarly, you should have your boiler serviced annually without fail, as a faulty boiler can produce dangerous levels of carbon monoxide. The same principle applies to health. You must have your eyes and hearing tested regularly, especially as you get older. Many people put off having these things done because they fear bad news, but early detection of problems is almost always better than dealing with serious issues later. I would also strongly recommend having your teeth professionally cleaned twice a year. It costs far less than having major dental work done after years of neglect. In short, there are some things in life where the cost of having them done properly is always far lower than the cost of not doing them at all.
